SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances for THURS-OCT-29-2009 in Department 613:
Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk L. Fong, matter is not reported
Lee Ackland, Appellant/Defendant appear in propria persona.
Sharelle Furnishings, Inc., Respondent/Plaintiff by CEO-President of Sharelle Furnishings, Inc., Jack Kiesler.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by the Presiding Judge for trial de novo. The parties are sworn, present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions presented by the Court as follows:

10:43 a.m. Jack Kiesler, testifies on behalf of SHARELLE FURNISHINGS, INC., Respondent/Plaintiff.
10:43 a.m. Lee Ackland, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf.
11:00 a.m. Jack Kiesler, responds to questions by the Court.
11:01 a.m. Lee Ackland responds to questions by the Court.
11:05 a.m. Eunsoon Ackland testifies on behalf of Lee Ackland, Appellant/Respondent
11:08 a.m. The matter is submitted. Court is adjourned.
